name: Addis Invoice OCR
description: AI-powered invoice processing pipeline for small businesses in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia. Users upload invoices (PDF/JPG/PNG) via a React web dashboard or a Telegram bot. n8n orchestrates Google Document AI for OCR text extraction and DeepSeek for structured data parsing. Extracted data (vendor, date, line items, grand total) is written to Google Sheets and surfaced in a searchable, filterable invoice history with detail modals and PDF export.

frontend.name: addis-invoice-dashboard

pages./upload: Drag-and-drop invoice upload with progress bar, processing spinner, and result card with detail modal
pages./invoices: Searchable, filterable, sortable invoice history table with detail modal and PDF download

components: UploadZone — drag-and-drop file upload area with validation
ProcessingSpinner — animated spinner shown during OCR+AI extraction
ResultsCard — extracted invoice preview with line items table and action buttons (Save, Download, View Invoice, Upload Another)
FilterBar — search, date range, and clear filters for invoice list
InvoiceTable — paginated, sortable table with eye/view, download, and delete actions
DetailsModal — full-screen overlay showing vendor, date, total, source, line items, items summary, and PDF export

hooks.useInvoiceUpload: Manages upload lifecycle — idle → uploading → processing → uploaded/completed/failed. Posts multipart FormData to n8n webhook. Handles progress, timeout (150s), CORS, and React StrictMode remount safety.
hooks.useInvoiceList: Fetches invoice history from n8n get-invoices webhook. Provides search, date filtering, sorting, pagination, and delete (local hide).

OCR-3.0-web.description: Main invoice processing workflow with dual entry points (Web + Telegram). Uses asynchronous Respond to Webhook pattern for immediate user feedback.

flow: 2. Generate Job ID — creates job_id, status=queued, passes binary file
3. Respond to Webhook — immediately returns {"status":"success","message":"..."} with CORS headers
4. Extract from File — Google Document AI OCR text extraction
5. Switch PDF/Image — routes to appropriate HTTP Request node
6. AI Agent + DeepSeek Chat Model + Structured Output Parser — parses vendor, date, items, grand_total from extracted text
7. Edit Fields — normalizes and formats extracted data
8. Append or update row in sheet — writes to Google Sheets
9. Switch → Send Telegram notification on success
1. Telegram Trigger — listens for file messages
2. Get a file — downloads file from Telegram
3. Extract from File — Google Document AI OCR
5. Converges with web path at AI Agent for parsing and Sheets storage

ai_models.ocr: Google Document AI (via n8n Extract from File node)
ai_models.parsing: DeepSeek Chat Model (via n8n LangChain nodes with Structured Output Parser)

immediate_ack.message: File uploaded successfully! Your invoice is being processed in the background.

response_format.async_result: Written to Google Sheets, surfaced via get-invoices webhook

get-invoices.description: GET webhook that returns the 15 most recent invoice rows from Google Sheets as JSON array.

backend.data_store: Google Sheets (append/update rows via n8n Google Sheets node)

data_flow.upload: User drops file → Frontend POST to n8n webhook → n8n acknowledges immediately → Background: Document AI OCR → DeepSeek AI parsing → Google Sheets
data_flow.history: Frontend GET /get-invoices → n8n reads Google Sheets → Returns last 15 rows → Frontend displays in sortable/filterable table
data_flow.detail_view: User clicks View Invoice → Frontend opens DetailsModal overlay with full invoice data (vendor, date, line items, total, summary) and PDF download

key_fixes_applied: Removed manual Content-Type: multipart/form-data header — let axios set boundary automatically
Fixed React StrictMode double-mount bug — mountedRef not reset to true on remount, silently dropping all upload state callbacks
Added View Invoice button to upload result screen — fetches latest invoice from API and opens DetailsModal with full detail view and PDF download
target_users: Small businesses in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia. Supports Amharic and English invoice formats.
